data.body: Resumed after background terminals stopped. Gerrit changes 893 (e833 schema regression) and 894 (2bbd close-time review enforcement) are open at patch set 1; both CI runs started, no votes yet, zero unresolved comments. Correct Gerrit REST authentication uses git credential fill for rebar.solutions.navateam.com; curl --netrc returns 401 because credentials are stored in the configured Git credential helper, not .netrc. Worktree /private/tmp/rebar-jira-reb-1160-cont4 is clean, ahead two review commits and behind origin/main by one unrelated commit.
